CreateCsn.clientToken: Idempotency token; ASCII string, max 64 characters; see ClientToken idempotency
CreateCsn.name: Name of the Cloud Smart Network
CreateCsn.description: Description of the Cloud Smart Network
CreateCsn.tags: List of tag key-value pairs to create
CreateCsn.tags.tagKey: Tag key; supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /.; length 1–65
CreateCsn.tags.tagValue: Tag value; supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /.; length 0–65
